Row.Text: Likes civilizations that have the same government and hates civilizations that declare war.
Likes civilizations that have the same government and hates civilizations that have many standing units.
From Each According to His Ability, to Each According To His Work

Every city gains 0.5 [ICON_Production] Production and 5% [ICON_Production] Production per [ICON_Citizen] Population.[NEWLINE] May not build Holy Site districts, gain Great Prophets, or found Religions.
All [ICON_TradeRoute] Domestic Trade Route +1 [ICON_Food] and +1 [ICON_Production] Production. All cities restore 15% [ICON_Production] Production upon completing construction.

Military unit restore [ICON_Movement] Movementand attacks after killing. All melee units +1 [ICON_Movement] and +5 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength. Strategic resource costs for units are discounted 40% and +15% [ICON_Production] Production when producing units.

A district unique to Soviet Union that is cheaper and available earlier than the district it replaces, the Industrial Zone.[NEWLINE] [ICON_Production] Production adjacency bonus provides [ICON_Food] Food as well. +1 [ICON_Production] Production adjacency bonus from Mines. +2 [ICON_Production] Production adjacency bonus from strategic resources.

Soviet Union unique Modern era unit that replaces Infantry. Need no resource and need nothing to maintain. +3 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength when fighting in the home territory. +1 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength for every adjacent Red Army.
